conversations.say: Inez, management flagged the unpreserved camera interval from the audit notice. We need to talk about how we present the service exit access before Morgan or anyone else turns it into a conspiracy.
conversations.offer: Exact building service route rhythms and access practices
conversations.request: Agreement on how to disclose the unrelated camera secret without exposing our uninvolved residents

conversations.say: Rafi, let's compare our shift records and service delivery notes. We need to keep our stories straight about who used the passages without fabricating a single customer identity.
conversations.request: A consistent timeline of shift collectors and courier movements

conversations.say: Morgan, management is trying to pin the camera gap entirely on me. Before I give you any bounded account of the service route, I need a clear commitment regarding resident anonymity and fair treatment.
conversations.offer: A bounded operational account of the camera audit context
conversations.request: A explicit promise of fair treatment and protection of tenant anonymity in your report

public_statement: The camera gap and automated access changes are separate physical events. Do not let anyone turn routine building maintenance into a murder story.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure boundaries for the camera gap to protect building residents

goal_progress: Approached Inez regarding the camera audit flag and negotiated a disclosure boundary.
Engaged Morgan to demand fair treatment before sharing a bounded account.
Initiated comparison of service route and shift observations with Rafi.
reasoning_summary: As Dee Nowak, superintendent of the building, my priority is protecting my pension and our residents from being scapegoated for an unpreserved camera interval and automated access changes. I initiated conversations with Inez to coordinate our disclosure, Rafi to align shift observations, and Morgan to demand fair treatment before providing any bounded account.
